headline: Tina Fey's 'The Four Seasons' Ups the Ante with Italian Escapades
lede: Peacock's comedy powerhouse is set to transport viewers to the picturesque landscapes of Italy for its sophomore season, promising fresh comedic terrain.
body:
### Comedy Goes International

Tina Fey's latest series is proving that lightning can strike twice. *The Four Seasons*, the critically acclaimed workplace comedy that debuted to strong reviews last year, will dramatically pivot its setting for season two, transporting its ensemble cast to the sun-drenched environs of Italy.

### Narrative Expansion

Created by Fey alongside Tracey Wigfield and Lang Fisher, the show appears to be leveraging an international relocation as a narrative reset. The trailer suggests the core characters will navigate cultural misunderstandings and professional challenges against a backdrop of Italian hospitality and potential workplace chaos.

### Production Insights

Sources close to the production indicate the season was partially filmed on location, lending authentic Mediterranean texture to the comedy's visual palette. The creative team's decision to dramatically shift geographical context signals confidence in the show's comedic elasticity and ensemble chemistry.

Fans can expect the season to debut later this month, with Peacock positioning the series as a marquee summer comedy offering.
key_facts: Created by Tina Fey, Tracey Wigfield, and Lang Fisher
Debuting later this month on Peacock
